sourceText: Everything is in constant flux, meaning that today is never the same as yesterday.
War is the father of all, and king of all.
This signifies that opposition and conflict are the fundamental forces that generate and rule all things.
Men do not know what they are doing when they do what they are doing, and they do not understand it when they learn.
This shows a critical insight that most people do not truly understand their actions or their consequences.

Pythagoras faced political persecution and internal divisions within his community, forcing him to flee his homeland. He experienced the pain of his ideas being misunderstood and his community disintegrating.
His mathematical and philosophical achievements were passed down to posterity, and his thought became a cornerstone of Western philosophy and science.

The core idea of the Pythagorean school, which sought to explain the fundamental principles of the universe through numbers and ratios. It implies that all phenomena are governed by mathematical order.
Pythagoras believed that the soul could be purified and virtue cultivated through the pursuit of knowledge. It emphasizes that knowing is the highest value humans should strive for.
Refrain from the practice of evil, and pursue the practice of virtue.
Beyond simply refraining from speech, this is an adage that emphasizes avoiding evil and practicing virtue. It highlights the importance of an ethical life.
Man is a being who seeks truth, and knowledge is the source of all things.
